nasb.text: and led Him to Annas first; for he was father-in-law of Caiaphas, who was high priest that year.

esv.text: First they led him to Annas, for he was the father-in-law of Caiaphas, who was high priest that year.

cnv.text: 先帶到亞那面前。亞那是當年的大祭司該亞法的岳父。

ccb.text: 他们押着耶稣去见亚那，就是那一年的大祭司该亚法的岳父。

csbs.text: 先带到亚纳面前，因为亚纳是当年的大祭司该亚法的岳父。
